title: Falcon  - Custom Button - Teams Detected
scenario: When Falcon/Mobile detects Teams, the Custom Button settings page displays Microsoft Teams as the default selected option while Other Providers is greyed out and inaccessible upon tap.
steps: 1. Launch Falcon/Mobile and ensure Microsoft Teams is detected.
2. Navigate to the Custom Button settings page.
3. Observe the UI layout showing two options: 'Microsoft Teams' (selected by default) and 'Other Providers' (greyed out).
4. Read the message stating that Microsoft Teams is connected and Other Providers is not available.
expected: Tapping 'Other Providers' should result in it being grayed out and inaccessible.
